intent.objective: Scan the China mainland feng shui-interested audience over the last 90 days and identify products that are repeatedly discussed but not dominated by strong brands
intent.targetSubject: feng shui and metaphysics audience consumption
intent.targetAudience: China mainland consumers interested in feng shui, luck, ritual, and metaphysics-adjacent products
intent.deliverable: a top-10 blue-ocean product shortlist with supporting evidence
intent.successCriteria: the shortlist should highlight products with repeated mention signals, clear purchase intent, and fragmented brand competition
mustExclude: pure belief discussion without product demand
